name: idea-management-vscode-runner
description: Connects VS Code to your IDEA Management app as a terminal runner: dispatched commands are 'poked' into a VS Code terminal via terminal.sendText.

imRunner.url.description: Base URL of your IDEA Management app.

imRunner.token.description: Per-runner token (create a runner in the app's Orchestrator page). Keep secret.

imRunner.autoConnect.description: Connect automatically on startup when a token is set.

imRunner.terminalName.description: Name of the VS Code terminal commands are sent to.
